Standard Markdown Fixture

This fixture exercises every CommonMark construct.

Inline

Bold italic bold italic strike code link https://auto-link.com email@example.com Hard break
next line.

Lists

  • Unordered

    • Nested

  • Another

    1. Ordered
    2. Items

  • Task done

  • Task todo

Blockquote

Nested

Double nested

Code

javascript
const x = 42;

Table

AB
12

Horizontal Rule

Footnote

Text[1].

  1. The footnote. ↩
